_metadata.notes: Full browser-verified scan completed April 3, 2026. All jersey numbers, partner data, and roster confirmed against official sources. Tomas Wiesner removed (not on official roster). Three GKs added. All partner handles browser-verified.

Jonathan Bond.partner_description: Partner. Display name 'Isabella Bond' on IG. ~12K followers. Recently revealed they're expecting/had a baby — March 20 'the three of us' post.
Jonathan Bond.kids: NEW BABY revealed March 20, 2026 — Jonathan posted about 'the three of us' and '2026 plot twist'. The Bond family just expanded.
fun_facts: Kept a clean sheet in the season opener vs Chicago (1-0 win)
Made key saves in the 7-goal thriller at Dallas
Bio: 📍LDN ⚽️ @houstondynamo 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 @isybellabond
~21K followers
Jonathan Bond.tea: BREAKING TEA: Jonathan Bond is a DAD. His March 20 post talked about 'the three of us' and a '2026 plot twist' — baby Bond has arrived. Isybella (display name Isabella Bond, ~12K followers) has been posting about 'falling deeper in love with being a mom.' This is the biggest Inner Circle reveal of the week.
Jonathan Bond.matchday_hook: New dad energy! Bond just revealed Baby Bond to the world on March 20. The man is keeping clean sheets on the pitch and dirty diapers at home.
Jonathan Bond.one_liner_sports: The steady hands behind the chaos — Bond has been tested early and often this season. Now also tested at 3am feedings.

Jimmy Maurer.one_liner_sports: Veteran backup goalkeeper providing depth behind Jonathan Bond.
Jimmy Maurer._gaps: Need Instagram handle. Need partner info. Minimal public presence.

Blake Gillingham.one_liner_sports: Young goalkeeper in the squad rotation.
Blake Gillingham._gaps: Need Instagram handle. Need partner info. NEW ADDITION — needs full research pass.

Logan Erb.one_liner_sports: Goalkeeper rounding out the depth chart.
Logan Erb._gaps: Need Instagram handle. Need partner info. NEW ADDITION — needs full research pass.

Erik Sviatchenko.partner_description: Wife. ~7K followers. Bio: 'William & Clara ❤️ @eriksviat ❤️ Lægeeksamineret Kosmetolog Klinikejer @klinikkenskon'. Runs skincare clinic @klinikkenskon. Former professional soccer player.
Erik Sviatchenko.kids: Two kids: William and Clara (confirmed via Anne's bio).
fun_facts: Captain of the team
Former Celtic FC (Scotland) player
~65K followers
Co-founder @justafewworks, board member @fcmsamfund
Scored a goal, conceded an own goal, AND got sent off in the same match vs FC Dallas — peak chaos energy
8th wedding anniversary on March 27, 2026 — posted '19 år som kærester og idag kan vi fejre 8 års bryllupsdag ❤️ Forevigt os ❤️' (19 years as sweethearts and today we celebrate 8 years of marriage)
Erik Sviatchenko.tea: The Dallas match was his magnum opus of chaos: scored to make it 3-2 Houston, then conceded an own goal, then got sent off with a second yellow in the 68th minute. The man lived an entire telenovela in 90 minutes. Then on March 27 he posted the sweetest 8th anniversary tribute to Anne — 19 years together total. The duality of this man: chaos on the pitch, romance at home. SUSPENDED for Seattle.
Erik Sviatchenko.matchday_hook: Erik can't play Saturday (suspended for the Dallas red card) but his 8th wedding anniversary post had the Inner Circle in their feelings. 19 years of love, one insane red card, zero chill.
Erik Sviatchenko.one_liner_sports: Captain and defensive leader — when he's not getting red cards, he's organizing the back line.
Erik Sviatchenko.status_april_4: SUSPENDED — second yellow card accumulation vs FC Dallas (Mar 21)

Lucas Halter.partner_description: Fiancée. Her posts say 'Luke's wife to be'. Active on IG with relationship content celebrating their engagement.
fun_facts: 85K followers
Joined from Botafogo in January 2026
Key part of the defense when fit
Lucas Halter.tea: Engaged alert! Madison Tayler has been posting as 'Luke's wife to be' — the wedding is coming. But Lucas is currently out injured (lower body, mid-April return), so the Inner Circle might not see him on the pitch Saturday.
Lucas Halter.one_liner_sports: Brazilian center back signed this offseason. Currently sidelined but the fiancée content is top tier.
Lucas Halter.status_april_4: OUT — lower body injury (mid-April return expected)

Antônio Carlos.partner_description: Wife. Full name Brunna Senna. ~17K followers. Active poster with lifestyle and family content.
Antônio Carlos.kids: Two kids: Antonia and Alice (confirmed via his bio: 'Abençoado por Deus Brunna, Antonia & Alice ❤️').
fun_facts: 86K followers
Bio: 'Abençoado por Deus Brunna, Antonia & Alice ❤️ @houstondynamo'
Got a straight red card vs LAFC (fouling Son Heung-Min outside the box in first half stoppage time)
Fined by MLS Disciplinary Committee for failing to leave the field in a timely manner after the red
NOW wears #3 (changed from #25)
Antônio Carlos.tea: This man's introduction to the 2026 season was fouling SON HEUNG-MIN and getting sent off for it. The audacity. Also got fined for not leaving the field fast enough after. Drama runs in this back line's veins. At home though — total family man. Brunna, Antonia, and Alice are his whole world per that bio.
Antônio Carlos.one_liner_sports: Experienced Brazilian center back who anchors the defense when he's not seeing red.

fun_facts: ~17K followers
Profile is PRIVATE
Joined Houston Dynamo FC in January 2026
Now wears #21 (changed from #3)
Franco Negri.one_liner_sports: Argentine defender added to bolster the back line. Keeps his IG private — mysterious energy.

fun_facts: ~31K followers
Won the CONMEBOL Recopa 2024 before coming to Houston
Scored his first Dynamo goal in the 3-2 win over Portland (Mar 14)
Managed by @t.in.mo on Instagram
Bio: 'Atleta do @houstondynamo : @t.in.mo CAMPEÃO DA CONMEBOL RECOPA 2024'
Felipe Andrade.tea: Scored his first goal as a Dynamo in that wild Portland match. The celebration was everything. Misses his family in Brazil — mentioned it in a 2025 interview.
Felipe Andrade.one_liner_sports: Brazilian defender who popped up with a crucial goal vs Portland.
Felipe Andrade._gaps: No partner info found publicly. Mentioned missing family in Brazil in interview.

fun_facts: ~2.3K followers
Bio: '@houstondynamo | @wassermansoccer'
Recently returned from ACL injury sustained in 2024
Signed as a homegrown player from UVA
Now wears #27 (changed from #34)
Reese Miller.one_liner_sports: Young American defender in the rotation. Coming back from ACL surgery like a warrior.

Sam Vines.partner_description: Wife — married Aug/Sep 2025. Wedding photographed by Jordan Imhoff Photography.
fun_facts: ~9.9K followers
USMNT defender — 9 caps, 1 goal (scored in 2021 Gold Cup)
Colorado Springs native, Colorado Rapids academy product
Played 3 years at Royal Antwerp in Belgium — won the Belgian treble in 2023
Left-footed left-back
Contract through 2027
Now confirmed as #13
Bio: just a cross ✞ — Christian vibes
Sam Vines.tea: Newlywed alert! Sam and Andrianna tied the knot in late summer 2025, and now they're settling into Houston life. He's a USMNT defender who literally scored in the Gold Cup. The Inner Circle needs to find Andrianna's Instagram ASAP.
Sam Vines.one_liner_sports: USMNT left-back signed as a free agent. Won the Belgian treble at Royal Antwerp.

fun_facts: 6-foot-6 — absolute unit
First Seton Hall player selected in the MLS SuperDraft since Sacha Kljestan in 2006
BIG EAST Defensive Player of the Year at Seton Hall
Originally signed to Dynamo 2, promoted to first team March 20, 2026
Already earned first-team minutes vs LAFC and Portland on short-term loans
Contract through 2026 with club options through 2028-29
Now confirmed as #34
Agustin Resch.tea: This 6'6" Argentine came through the SuperDraft from Seton Hall and was SO good in his Dynamo 2 cameos that they promoted him to the first team after just three weeks. The first Pirate drafted since Kljestan? That's a flex.
Agustin Resch.one_liner_sports: Towering Argentine center back promoted from Dynamo 2 after impressive early performances.
Agustin Resch._gaps: Need Instagram handle. Need partner info. NEW SIGNING — needs full research pass.

Héctor Herrera.partner_description: Divorced from Shantal Mayo in 2025 (TUDN confirmed). Currently single as far as public sources show. Rumored link to actress Paola Villalobos unconfirmed.
fun_facts: 1.1M Instagram followers — biggest IG in the entire squad by a country mile
Two-time MLS All-Star with Houston
Captained the Dynamo to the 2023 U.S. Open Cup title
Returned to Houston after a season at Deportivo Toluca in Liga MX
Veteran Mexican international — previously at Porto and Atlético Madrid
Posted 'Marzo 2026' recap on April 1 — active content creator
Bio: 'Futbolista profesional en @houstondynamo Campañas: @staypro Rosarito'
Héctor Herrera.tea: The prodigal son returned. Herrera came BACK to Houston after a year in Mexico, and he's freshly divorced from Shantal Mayo (confirmed 2025). Single king era? The TikTok content has been 👀. With 1.1M followers, he's the biggest IG presence on the squad and it's not even close. His Marzo 2026 recap was giving main character energy.
Héctor Herrera.matchday_hook: 1.1M followers, freshly single, and posting monthly recaps like a lifestyle influencer. Héctor Herrera is everyone's problematic fave.
Héctor Herrera.one_liner_sports: Veteran Mexican international and former Dynamo captain. Provides leadership and experience in midfield.

Artur.partner_description: Wife. Married since 2019. Handle is @rachelblima (NOT @rachel.limaaa — old handle may redirect). Her bio has '@gabrielcelini__' tagged. ~2.9K followers.
Artur.kids: Daughter — celebrated her 1st birthday recently. Post: '1 ano da nossa pequenina!' (1 year of our little one!)
fun_facts: ~22K followers
Display name: Artur Lima
Daughter turned 1 — posted sweet birthday celebration
Married to Rachel since 2019
Featured in Dynamo sustainability video with Rachel
Artur.tea: Baby girl just turned ONE! Artur posted the sweetest birthday tribute. He and Rachel have been married since 2019 and are building their little family in Houston. Unfortunately he's out injured right now (lower body, knee per BeSoccer, mid-April return). Note: Rachel's handle is @rachelblima not @rachel.limaaa.
Artur.one_liner_sports: Brazilian midfielder who controls the tempo in the middle of the park.
Artur.status_april_4: OUT — lower body injury (knee per BeSoccer, mid-April return expected)

Diadié Samassékou.partner_description: Wife. Known as 'Mme Samassekou Anna' per Malian football content. TikTok: @dhinebitesweet.
Diadié Samassékou.kids: At least one child (baby featured in TikTok content from Nov 2023).
fun_facts: 115K followers
Malian international
Featured in African Cup of Nations content while at Houston
Diadié Samassékou.tea: The Malian international and his wife Anna are couple goals in the West African football community — they've been featured on multiple football couples TikTok accounts. Anna's TikTok is @dhinebitesweet. They recently welcomed a baby.
Diadié Samassékou.one_liner_sports: Malian international midfielder — the engine room workhorse.

Duane Holmes.partner_description: Wife (married June 2022). Bio: 'Wife + Mama @brookesavannahmua'. Also runs @brookesavannahmua (makeup artistry account). ~1.1K followers.
Duane Holmes.kids: At least one child — Brooke's bio says 'Mama' and Duane has a highlight called 'Bonnie Holmes' (likely daughter).
fun_facts: ~18K followers
Bio: '@houstondynamo Management - @twotouchagency'
Brooke also runs a makeup artistry IG: @brookesavannahmua
Duane Holmes.tea: Duane and Brooke are the low-key couple goals of the squad. She's 'Wife + Mama' in the bio and runs a whole makeup artistry business (@brookesavannahmua) while supporting the Dynamo life. Their anniversary posts are sweet.
Duane Holmes.one_liner_sports: Versatile midfielder who can play multiple positions across the midfield and attack.

Agustín Bouzat.partner_description: Wife (married Dec 2022). Physical Education teacher. Bio: '☀️🏝️ • 1996 • • Profe de Ed. Física 🤸🏼‍♀️'. ~6.5K followers.
fun_facts: ~64K followers
Former captain of CA Vélez Sársfield
Turned 32 on March 28, 2026
Got a red card vs LAFC for fouling Son Heung-Min as last defender
Hit the crossbar from near midfield in the 47th minute of the LAFC match before the red — almost had a banger
Also fined for not leaving the field fast enough after his red
Now wears #30 (changed from #22)
Agustín Bouzat.tea: Almost scored the goal of the season from midfield, then got sent off in the same match. The duality of Bouzat. Both he and Antônio Carlos fouled Son Heung-Min and got reds in the SAME game — Houston finished with 9 men. Fiorella posted the sweetest birthday tribute on March 28 for his 32nd. Salvador turned 2 in January. Family vibes are immaculate.
Agustín Bouzat.matchday_hook: 32 and thriving — Fiorella posted a birthday tribute, Salvador is 2, and Bouzat is still capable of moments of absolute chaos and brilliance.
Agustín Bouzat.one_liner_sports: Argentine midfielder formerly of Vélez Sársfield. Capable of brilliance and chaos in equal measure.

fun_facts: ~7.6K followers
Youngest first-team signing in Houston Dynamo franchise history
Signed as a homegrown player from the Dynamo Academy
Only 15 years old
Bio: 'all glory to him @houstondynamo @adidasfootball @elcielomanagement'
Representing Mexico U-16 National Team
Now wears #22 (changed from #17)
Matthew Arana.tea: Baby of the team alert! Matthew is literally 15 and already has a first-team contract. Youngest signing in franchise history. He's also representing Mexico U-16 — dual national king. The Academy parents must be losing their minds.
Matthew Arana.one_liner_sports: 15-year-old homegrown prodigy — the youngest first-team signing in club history.

fun_facts: 19K Instagram followers
Featured in MLS Future Stars campaign
Key assist provider — set up Guilherme's first goal vs Chicago with a perfectly weighted through ball
USMNT midfielder with 35 caps
Gold Cup finalist — played every match
Phone lock screen is literally the 2026 World Cup logo
First MLS player bought and sold under new cash-for-player system
Recently announced an injury that will sideline him for the remainder of the season
Jack McGlynn.tea: His whole personality right now is World Cup 2026. Lock screen is the tournament logo on a black background. 35 USMNT caps and counting. Played every match in the Gold Cup. BUT he recently posted about a significant injury — could be a devastating blow to both Houston and his World Cup dreams.
Jack McGlynn.one_liner_sports: Young American midfielder with vision. The creative link in Houston's build-up play.
Jack McGlynn._gaps: No partner info found. Injury status needs clarification for April 4.

Ondřej Lingr.partner_description: Wife. Bio says '𝚖𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚢'. ~5.9K followers. Profile is private. They have a son named Mikuláš (born Feb 2025).
fun_facts: 33K followers
Profile is PRIVATE
Bio: '@houstondynamo · @top_11_football_agency Houston, Tx'
Czech warrior who said 'I'm a warrior' in his intro interview
Moved wife Lucie and son Mikuláš to Houston
Position is officially Midfielder (MF on roster page, not FW)
Ondřej Lingr.tea: Czech warrior who said 'I'm a warrior' in his intro interview. Moved wife Lucie and their son Mikuláš to Houston for this opportunity. Called it a chance he couldn't pass up. Lucie's IG bio just says '𝚖𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚢' and that's kind of everything.
Ondřej Lingr.one_liner_sports: Czech midfielder who provides creativity and grit. Self-described warrior.

Mateusz Bogusz.partner_description: Wife, Pilates instructor, owns @no13.pilates. 24K IG followers. Based in Houston TX / Katowice, Poland. Display name 'ᴡɪᴋɪ'. TikTok: @wiktoria.wychowska.
Mateusz Bogusz.kids: Baby girl expected Feb 2026 — 'She's on her way' posted Jan 7. Wiktoria's last own post was Jan 21. She was tagged in Bogusz's Mar 15 post in Houston. Baby has likely arrived but they're keeping it private for now. BABY WATCH CONTINUES.
fun_facts: 142K followers
Houston's most expensive signing ever — Designated Player from Cruz Azul (Mexico)
Former LAFC fan favorite — scored 18 goals in 2024
Polish international
Scored the 105th-minute winner vs Portland — second latest goal in MLS history
Wiktoria runs a Pilates studio and has 24K IG followers
Bio includes 'She's on her way · ⏳❤️' — baby girl announcement
Mateusz Bogusz.tea: The man scored in the 105TH MINUTE against Portland. Second latest goal in MLS history. His wife Wiktoria is a Pilates instructor with her own studio and 24K followers — she's been quiet since early March, baby girl was due in February. Wiktoria's last own post was Jan 21. She was tagged in Bogusz's Mar 15 post in Houston. BABY WATCH IS AT DEFCON 1. New dad energy is imminent.
Mateusz Bogusz.matchday_hook: Bogusz scored the second-latest goal in MLS history AND his baby girl was due in February. We're on full baby watch — Wiktoria hasn't posted since January 21.
Mateusz Bogusz.one_liner_sports: Houston's record signing and creative engine. Scores goals that make you question the laws of physics and time.

Guilherme.relationship_status: unknown — mentions 'family' in interviews but no partner publicly identified
Guilherme.partner_description: No partner found. Unverified: Rebecca Vieira (@rebeccavieirax, 546K followers) shares his surname and is Brazilian, but connection NOT confirmed. DO NOT publish until verified.
fun_facts: 439K followers — second biggest IG in the squad after Herrera
Designated Player signed from Santos FC for ~$2M
Scored twice on his MLS debut vs Chicago (2-1 win)
Has a signature celebration called 'Passinho do Beloved' (Portuguese: Passinho do Amado) — a dance he brought from Santos
Neymar texted him after his hat trick saying 'you learned that from me' — they were teammates at Santos
4 goals and 3 assists in 4 matches — leading the team in both
Scored 3 goals in a 5-minute span to lead the comeback vs Dallas (assisted Sviatchenko and Ennali)
Nearly 100 professional goals across Brazil and the Middle East
Bio: '@houstondynamo @adidasbrasil @asfootball @monicasantos_assessoria'
Display name includes 🇧🇷 🇺🇸 flags
Recent posts focus on match celebrations and religion — 'Amado is happy Gloria a Deus ❤️‍'
Guilherme.tea: The breakout star of the season. Scored TWO goals in his MLS debut and has not stopped — 4 goals, 3 assists in 4 matches. Neymar literally texted him after a hat trick. The Passinho do Beloved celebration is iconic. 439K followers and counting. No confirmed partner — the man is all about football and God right now.
Guilherme.matchday_hook: Guilherme is on FIRE — 4 goals, 3 assists and the whole squad revolves around him. Neymar's in his DMs. Main character energy.
Guilherme.one_liner_sports: Brazilian Designated Player and early-season MVP candidate. 4 goals, 3 assists in 4 matches.
Guilherme._gaps: Partner verification needed. Rebecca Vieira (@rebeccavieirax) is a possible lead but unconfirmed.

Ezequiel Ponce.partner_description: Wife. Handle: @martu.madeop. Bio: 'I'm taking a social media break'. ~6.7K followers. Last post Jul 2024 ('Life lately TX'). Ezequiel frequently tags her in family posts.
Ezequiel Ponce.kids: Young family — Ezequiel's bio references family ('Seguidor de Jesús Eclesiastés 4:12 ‍  ‍  ‍  ⭐️') and MLS described them as having a 'young family'.
fun_facts: ~31K followers
Wears the #10 shirt — Designated Player, club-record transfer from AEK Athens
Turned 29 on March 29, 2026
Bio: 'Seguidor de Jesús Eclesiastés 4:12'
8 goals on the 2026 season so far
Ezequiel Ponce.tea: Ponce just turned 29 on March 29 and is banging in goals — 8 on the season. His wife Martina is on a self-declared social media break (bio literally says 'I'm taking a social media break') since July 2024. Respect the boundary but also... we're curious.
Ezequiel Ponce.matchday_hook: 8 goals and counting — the Argentine goal machine just turned 29 and shows no signs of slowing.
Ezequiel Ponce.one_liner_sports: Argentine striker wearing the prestigious #10. Club-record signing delivering on the price tag.

Lawrence Ennali.partner_description: Girlfriend. Luxury makeup & hairstylist based in Houston. Runs @presleeclarkartistry. Bio: 'Luxury Makeup & Hairstyling | Bridal, Pageants, Commercial, Lessons | Based in Houston'. Posted 'Big fan of #11'.
fun_facts: ~11.8K followers — profile is PRIVATE
Bio: 'HTX/BLN' (Houston/Berlin)
Scored the go-ahead goal in the Dallas match to make it 3-2 (before the collapse)
Preslee is a luxury makeup & hairstylist with her own TikTok artistry account
Preslee posted 'Big fan of #11' — we love a supportive girlfriend
Lawrence Ennali.tea: Lawrence and Preslee are the content couple. She's a luxury makeup & hairstylist with her own artistry TikTok, and he's scoring bangers. She posted 'Big fan of #11' which is basically a Declaration of Coupledome. His IG is private but the BCS post-match article specifically quoted Ennali after the Dallas loss.
Lawrence Ennali.one_liner_sports: German forward with pace and directness. Scored in the wild Texas Derby.

Nick Markanich.partner_description: Partner. Frequently tagged in posts. Has a dedicated story highlight 'Us Forever🕊️'.
fun_facts: ~5.2K followers
Bio mentions @houstondynamo, #17
Highlights include 'Us Forever🕊️' (relationship), 'Debut', 'Preszn', '🇪🇸' (Spanish stint)
On loan for the 2026 season from CD Castellón
Red card vs Portland for serious foul play — studs-up on goalkeeper James Pantemis, caused a gash and blood
Also fined for refusing to leave the field in a timely manner after the red
Received additional 1-match suspension from MLS Disciplinary Committee (2 matches total)
Now wears #17 (changed from #7)
Nick Markanich.tea: This man got a red card for STUDS UP on the Portland goalkeeper, caused actual blood on the pitch, then wouldn't leave the field. Got fined AND an extra game ban. He's serving match 2 vs Seattle. Chaos incarnate. But the 'Us Forever🕊️' highlight with Abby McHugh? Soft side unlocked.
Nick Markanich.one_liner_sports: American forward on loan. Currently serving a 2-match suspension for serious foul play.
Nick Markanich.status_april_4: SUSPENDED — serving match 2 of 2-match ban (serious foul play vs Portland). Misses Seattle match.

Aliyu Ibrahim.partner_description: Partner/wife. Handle: @ayshatou_jegah. Their wedding is documented on @theaa.wedding23. She's a 'Football Icon' awards attendee.
fun_facts: ~18K followers
Nigerian forward with TikTok presence
'Football Icon Awardee' for 100 Iconic Personalities of the Year 2026 awards in Lagos
Wedding documented on @theaa.wedding23
Now wears #24 (changed from #27)
Aliyu Ibrahim.tea: Aliyu and Ayshatou's wedding was a whole production — they have a dedicated wedding IG (@theaa.wedding23). He's been nominated for a 'Football Icon' award at the 100 Iconic Personalities ceremony in Lagos. International recognition energy.
Aliyu Ibrahim.one_liner_sports: Nigerian forward providing depth in the attack. Football Icon award nominee.

_metadata.recent_form: Won 3 straight after opening loss to RSL. Strong defensively. Advanced in CONCACAF Champions Cup. Playing midweek vs Tigres in Champions Cup — ROTATION RISK for Saturday.
_metadata.key_absences: Paul Arriola (knee — OUT), Jackson Ragen (hamstring — OUT). Danny Musovski may be limited. Obed Vargas transferred to Atlético Madrid. Playing 5+ consecutive away matches while Lumen Field prepares for World Cup.
_metadata.tactical_notes: Strong defensive shape, clinical on the counter. Rusnák the creative hub. Five away matches in a row gives Houston a slight home advantage — Sounders haven't played at home since Feb 22. Rotation likely due to midweek Champions Cup match vs Tigres.
_metadata.key_renewals: Nouhou, Alex Roldan, Danny Musovski, Osaze De Rosario all signed new contracts March 10.

players_to_watch.name: Andrew Thomas
fun_facts: Took over from legendary Stefan Frei
Strong shot-stopper
Comfortable playing out from the back
players_to_watch.tea: The new man between the sticks after Stefan Frei's era ended. Big shoes to fill and he's doing it quietly.
players_to_watch.one_liner: Seattle's new starting GK — took over from legend Stefan Frei and hasn't looked back.

players_to_watch.name: Paul Rothrock
fun_facts: Most active attacking threat for Seattle
Intelligent runs behind the defense
Always plays well against Houston — a consistent thorn in their side
players_to_watch.tea: This guy has Houston's number. Always turns up against the Dynamo. Intelligent runs, always in the right place. The Inner Circle should know his face.
players_to_watch.one_liner: Seattle's most dangerous attacker — always seems to play well against Houston.

players_to_watch.name: Albert Rusnák
fun_facts: One of the biggest free agent signings in MLS history (joined Sounders 2022)
Slovak international
4th player in Sounders history to reach 39 assists across all competitions
21 goals and 26 assists in league play over last 2 seasons
Helped Sounders win CONCACAF Champions Cup and Leagues Cup
Self-described 'quiet star' — lets his play do the talking
Creative engine, controls tempo, can score and assist
players_to_watch.tea: The 'quiet star' who's actually one of the best players in MLS. Albert and Tanicka have been together for years — they have a daughter Ariana (born 2017). He's won literally everything: Champions Cup, Leagues Cup. The resume is ridiculous.
players_to_watch.one_liner: Slovak international and MLS assist machine. 21 goals and 26 assists in the last 2 regular seasons.

players_to_watch.name: Cristian Roldan
players_to_watch.kids: Baby girl born July 2024. Announced April 2024.
fun_facts: Led Sounders with 14 assists across all competitions last season
Back in USMNT contention for the 2026 World Cup
Married Ciana Nicole in January 2023
His brother Alex Roldan also plays for the Sounders (right back)
players_to_watch.tea: Brother duo alert! Cristian AND Alex Roldan both play for Seattle. Cristian married Ciana in early 2023, and they welcomed a baby girl in July 2024. He's been the heartbeat of the Sounders for years and might make the US World Cup squad this summer. 62K followers on Instagram — the biggest Sounders personality.
players_to_watch.one_liner: Sounders' midfield general and USMNT contender. 14 assists last season.

players_to_watch.name: Jordan Morris
players_to_watch.kids: Son Theo (born Oct 2023) and daughter Emilie Daly Morris (born Dec 7, 2025).
fun_facts: All-time leading scorer in Sounders history (91 goals across all competitions)
Local kid — grew up in the Seattle area
Daughter Emilie born just 4 months ago (Dec 2025)
Coming back from injury-plagued 2025 (hamstring and shoulder)
players_to_watch.tea: Girl dad x2! Jordan and Eliza just welcomed baby Emilie in December 2025 — she's only 4 months old. He's the Sounders' all-time leading scorer AND a local Seattle kid. The family content on his Instagram is *chef's kiss*.
players_to_watch.one_liner: Sounders legend. All-time leading scorer. Bouncing back from an injury-plagued 2025.

season_narrative.red_cards: 4 red cards in 4 matches (league leaders). Antônio Carlos + Bouzat vs LAFC (finished 9 men), Markanich vs Portland (serious foul play), Sviatchenko vs Dallas (2nd yellow).
season_narrative.vibe: Fun but flawed — Bayou City Soccer's headline says it all. This team is appointment television. 7-goal thrillers, 105th-minute winners, finishing matches with 9 men, a player who scores AND gets an own goal AND gets sent off in the same match. This is chaotic, passionate, and deeply entertaining.
season_narrative.guilherme_watch: 4 goals, 3 assists in 4 matches. The main character. Neymar is texting him. Has a signature dance. Brazilian Designated Player energy. 439K followers.
suspensions_april_4: Nick Markanich — match 2 of 2-match ban (serious foul play vs Portland)
Erik Sviatchenko — 1-match suspension (2nd yellow vs Dallas)
injuries_april_4: Artur — lower body / knee (OUT — mid-April return expected)
Lucas Halter — lower body (OUT — mid-April return expected)
